ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Hope you are enjoying our SaaS platform. Ye ek friendly reminder hai ki aapka subscription 15th May 2026 ko renew hone wala hai. Renewal rate $99/month hai, jisme saare premium features aur 24/7 support shamil hai.

Agar aap apna current plan maintain karna chahte hain, toh koi action required nahi. Agar upgrade ya plan adjust karna hai, please visit <URL> aur apne account me login karein.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,
The SaaS Team

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO – Immediate Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Main XYZ Corp ka CEO hoon. Mujhe abhi ek urgent request mili hai from financial department regarding a critical client transaction. Iss process ko fast karne ke liye, aapko $200 ka gift card purchase karke mujhe confirm karna hoga.

Please complete purchase within next 15 minutes to avoid penalty. Main personally verify karta hoon aur aapko immediately reimburse karunga.

Thank you for cooperation.

Regards,
John Doe
CEO, XYZ Corp
